atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports back pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports back pain following golfing.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports an immediate need to hit the ground after the pop.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the back pain loosened up a little bit by Monday morning.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the back pain is still pretty sore.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports struggling with his right foot.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports struggling with his right leg.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has a history of surgery on his lower back.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports congestive heart failure.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is currently taking his medications for heart failure.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies problems laying flat while he goes to bed.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a sweet tooth.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient monitors his blood sugars at home.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is currently taking metformin.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports weakness in the right leg

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The doctor's examination revealed a 2 out of 6 systolic ejection murmur

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The doctor's examination revealed pain to palpation of the lumbar 5 or lumbar spine at the level of L5

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The doctor's examination revealed decreased range of motion with flexion and extension

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The doctor's examination revealed a positive straight leg raise

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The doctor's examination revealed a strength of 4 out of 5 on the right

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The doctor's examination revealed a strength of 5 out of 5 on the left

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The x-ray shows normal lumbar spine alignment

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The diabetic lab shows a hemoglobin A1c of 8

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The doctor prescribes meloxicam 15 milligrams once a day

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The doctor orders a physical therapy referral

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The doctor orders a lumbar MRI if symptoms persist

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The doctor increases metformin to 1,000 milligrams twice daily
